---
pagetitle: "Information dynamics in human–AI systems"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}

<div class="research-subpage">

<section class="research-subpage-intro">
  <div class="research-kicker">Generative AI · Feedback · Adaptation</div>
  <h2 class="research-title">Information dynamics in human–AI systems</h2>
  <div class="research-lede">
    <h3><i>How does information evolve when humans and AI systems participate in feedback loops?</i></h3>
  </div>
</section>


<section class="research-subpage-section">
  <h2 class="research-section-title">Overview</h2>
  <p>
    This research theme examines how information evolves when humans and AI systems communicate and interact with each other. I am interested in generative AI not only as a technical artefact, but as a latent field shaping cultural, organisational, and epistemic dynamics.
  </p>
  <p>
    Cybernetics offers a practical language for studying these systems: communication, feedback, adaptation, observation, and recursive change.
  </p>
</section>



<section class="research-band">
  <div class="research-subpage-section">
    <h2 class="research-section-title">Relevant publications</h2>
    <p class="research-muted">
      This list is intended for publications connected to human–AI interaction, generative AI, communication, feedback, adaptation, and information dynamics.
    </p>

    <div class="publication-list">
    
      <article class="publication-item" style="--publication-border: none; --publication-border-radius: none; --publication-background: none;">
      	<a class="publication-snapshot-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1109/SMC58881.2025.11342470">
        	<img class="publication-snapshot" src="../images/publications/ieee_smc.jpg" alt="Snapshot image for IEEE SMC 2025">
        </a>
        <div class="publication-detail">
          <h3>Semantic topologies in the recursive application of generative AI models</h3>
          <div class="publication-meta">
            <strong>Authors:</strong> Ben Swift, <u>Sungyeon Hong</u><br>
            <strong>Year:</strong> 2026<br>
            <strong>Conference:</strong> 2025 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC)
          </div>
          <p class="publication-description">
            [Add a brief description]
          </p>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="publication-item" style="--publication-border: none; --publication-border-radius: none; --publication-background: none;">
		    <a class="publication-snapshot-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1145/3716553.3750749">
						<img class="publication-snapshot" src="../images/publications/acm_digital_lib.png" alt="Snapshot image for ICMI 2025">
				</a>
        <div class="publication-detail">
          <h3>A scenario-based design pack for exploring multimodal human–GenAI relations</h3>
          <div class="publication-meta">
            <strong>Authors:</strong> Josh Andres, Chris Danta, Andrea Bianchi, Sahar Farzanfar, Gloria Milena Fernandez-Nieto, Alexa Becker, Tara Capel, Frances Liddell, Shelby Hagemann, Ned Cooper, <u>Sungyeon Hong</u>, Li Lin, Eduardo Benitez Sandoval, Anna Brynskov, Hubert Dariusz Zając, Zhuying Li, Tianyi Zhang, Arngeir Berge<br>
            <strong>Year:</strong> 2025<br>
            <strong>Publisher:</strong> Proceedings of the 27th International Conference on Multimodal Interaction
          </div>
          <p class="publication-description">
            [Add a brief description]
          </p>
        </div>
      </article>
      
      <article class="publication-item" style="--publication-border: none; --publication-border-radius: none; --publication-background: none;">
      	<a class="publication-snapshot-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1145/3656156.3658403">
        	<img class="publication-snapshot" src="../images/publications/dis.png" alt="Snapshot image for DIS 2024">
        </a>
        <div class="publication-detail">
          <h3>Understanding and Shaping Human-Technology Assemblages in the Age of Generative AI</h3>
          <div class="publication-meta">
            <strong>Authors:</strong> Josh Andres, Chris Danta, Andrea Bianchi, <u>Sungyeon Hong</u>, Zhuying Li, Eduardo Benitez Sandoval, Charles Patrick Martin, Ned Cooper<br>
            <strong>Year:</strong> 2024<br>
            <strong>Conference:</strong> 2024 ACM Designing Interactive Systems Conference
          </div>
          <p class="publication-description">
            [Add a brief description]
          </p>
        </div>
      </article>
      
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


</div>

```
